The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the madder family. Rytigynia kidaria is native to tropical Africa and is typically found in woodland and grassland habitats. The classification of Rytigynia kidaria reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Rubiaceae family.
